        + u^33*(u - 1)^4*(u^4 + u^3 + u^2 + u + 1)^4*(2*u^26 - 8*u^25 + 45*u^24 + 6*u^23 - 13*u^22 + 36*u^21 - 367*u^20 + 927*u^19 + 244*u^18 + 452*u^17 - 831*u^16 - 607*u^15 + 461*u^14 + 1234*u^13 - 634*u^12 + 1829*u^11 - 8846*u^10 + 10640*u^9 + 4687*u^8 + 3428*u^7 + 885*u^6 + 190*u^5 + 23*u^4 - 8*u^3 + 45*u^2 + 7*u + 3)*v^3

        + u^40*(u - 1)^4*(u^4 + u^3 + u^2 + u + 1)^4*(u^12 - u^9 + u^7 + u^6 + 2*u^4 - 9*u^3 + 45*u^2 + 7*u + 3)*v
        - u^42*(u - 1)^4*(u^4 + u^3 + u^2 + u + 1)^4;

17716285*G^4*x^42-354573481295*G^4*x^41+392155918530*G^4*x^40-478550503865*G^4*x^39+637684031720*G^4*x^38-863443239925*G^4*x^37+1101438928645*G^4*x^36-1255164691105*G^4*x^35+1232475517025*G^4*x^34-1010319664890*G^4*x^33+661893966500*G^4*x^32-313129920165*G^4*x^31+62811816940*G^4*x^30+64207236600*G^4*x^29-100793646460*G^4*x^28+91773672070*G^4*x^27-65990983040*G^4*x^26+37064693845*G^4*x^25-12874897005*G^4*x^24-1742157180*G^4*x^23+6711020045*G^4*x^22-5864165570*G^4*x^21+3405123355*G^4*x^20-1524624320*G^4*x^19+554698065*G^4*x^18-145696130*G^4*x^17-6656020*G^4*x^16+46095810*G^4*x^15-38799625*G^4*x^14+21025045*G^4*x^13-8331365*G^4*x^12+2485320*G^4*x^11-556920*G^4*x^10+91500*G^4*x^9-10455*G^4*x^8+745*G^4*x^7-25*G^4*x^6+32*G^3*x^61+188*G^3*x^60-12648*G^3*x^59+160732*G^3*x^58-1123012*G^3*x^57+5156996*G^3*x^56-16489296*G^3*x^55+36190992*G^3*x^54-45029764*G^3*x^53-22917600*G^3*x^52+296255616*G^3*x^51-955834328*G^3*x^50+2219949208*G^3*x^49-4363179740*G^3*x^48+7730912604*G^3*x^47-12618415996*G^3*x^46+18969000040*G^3*x^45-26123406196*G^3*x^44+33003205216*G^3*x^43-38853045120*G^3*x^42+44191802324*G^3*x^41-51393117772*G^3*x^40+64423832484*G^3*x^39-87361690632*G^3*x^38+121432339532*G^3*x^37-161338910268*G^3*x^36+193822465840*G^3*x^35-202179498832*G^3*x^34+176514433764*G^3*x^33-122585026804*G^3*x^32+60334614728*G^3*x^31-11500319932*G^3*x^30-13482887888*G^3*x^29+18405758060*G^3*x^28-13771453260*G^3*x^27+7855430144*G^3*x^26-3655991268*G^3*x^25+1069413068*G^3*x^24+423107832*G^3*x^23-1011564696*G^3*x^22+919483192*G^3*x^21-541873760*G^3*x^20+212288088*G^3*x^19-43196764*G^3*x^18-8487580*G^3*x^17+12820132*G^3*x^16-7825988*G^3*x^15+3963988*G^3*x^14-1830072*G^3*x^13+731544*G^3*x^12-236404*G^3*x^11+58776*G^3*x^10-10764*G^3*x^9+1368*G^3*x^8-108*G^3*x^7+4*G^3*x^6+243*G^2*x^59-5175*G^2*x^58+51831*G^2*x^57-323484*G^2*x^56+1402689*G^2*x^55-4445040*G^2*x^54+10457112*G^2*x^53-17749944*G^2*x^52+18284820*G^2*x^51+3871938*G^2*x^50-69328494*G^2*x^49+197347752*G^2*x^48-401043834*G^2*x^47+683172243*G^2*x^46-1030812837*G^2*x^45+1418011506*G^2*x^44-1829867868*G^2*x^43+2299794495*G^2*x^42-2930016120*G^2*x^41+3884773050*G^2*x^40-5376430953*G^2*x^39+7633907646*G^2*x^38-10775517639*G^2*x^37+14543277579*G^2*x^36-18051515505*G^2*x^35+19884589137*G^2*x^34-18756917946*G^2*x^33+14451168936*G^2*x^32-8276484285*G^2*x^31+2464736748*G^2*x^30+1174677111*G^2*x^29-2256917232*G^2*x^28+1691737905*G^2*x^27-720240507*G^2*x^26+78276495*G^2*x^25+141095487*G^2*x^24-141051474*G^2*x^23+94202901*G^2*x^22-57990921*G^2*x^21+32582268*G^2*x^20-13868679*G^2*x^19+2688246*G^2*x^18+1484700*G^2*x^17-1732377*G^2*x^16+930441*G^2*x^15-335574*G^2*x^14+86814*G^2*x^13-16101*G^2*x^12+2052*G^2*x^11-162*G^2*x^10+6*G^2*x^9+30*G*x^58-614*G*x^57+5948*G*x^56-36208*G*x^55+154994*G*x^54-494246*G*x^53+1211252*G*x^52-2310708*G*x^51+3399324*G*x^50-3621316*G*x^49+1968672*G*x^48+2163554*G*x^47-8479938*G*x^46+15551064*G*x^45-21289482*G*x^44+25032570*G*x^43-31071632*G*x^42+50727344*G*x^41-99580894*G*x^40+190790240*G*x^39-329232614*G*x^38+508261684*G*x^37-706151498*G*x^36+882616094*G*x^35-983575450*G*x^34+960762870*G*x^33-799569868*G*x^32+536873768*G*x^31-252089538*G*x^30+30459242*G*x^29+80570444*G*x^28-91011322*G*x^27+49980718*G*x^26-7184550*G*x^25-13699362*G*x^24+14830904*G*x^23-8231652*G*x^22+2548582*G*x^21-24430*G*x^20-459050*G*x^19+290674*G*x^18-109654*G*x^17+28784*G*x^16-5362*G*x^15+684*G*x^14-54*G*x^13+2*G*x^12+x^57-20*x^56+190*x^55-1140*x^54+4846*x^53-15524*x^52+38950*x^51-78660*x^50+130831*x^49-183791*x^48+226680*x^47-264724*x^46+334268*x^45-507820*x^44+865118*x^43-1399374*x^42+1883715*x^41-1823954*x^40+624089*x^39+2082815*x^38-6145400*x^37+10802276*x^36-14817571*x^35+16873364*x^34-16194063*x^33+13070553*x^32-8779238*x^31+4827862*x^30-2126156*x^29+731088*x^28-196048*x^27+48598*x^26-17780*x^25+8708*x^24-3513*x^23+987*x^22-182*x^21+20*x^20-x^19)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
